feed.title: Maine Human Rights Commission — Proposed/Adopted Rule Changes
feed.subtitle: Content is a series of heading+list blocks (one per rule-change episode) with no single repeating item container simple selectors can isolate reliably; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Maine Human Rights Commission — Proposed/Adopted Rule Changes
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
